prompt: I'm redesigning the icon for my iOS app. It has a colored background and a single graphic mark on top — pretty simple. I want to use Icon Composer to make it look great in dark mode and with the tinted appearance. Where do I start and what should I be thinking about as I set up my layers?
assertions: Mentions 1024×1024 (or 1024px) as the correct canvas size for iOS
Advises separating the background from the foreground as distinct layers
Mentions deferring blur, shadow, or specular effects to Icon Composer (not baking them into source artwork)
Explains how to customise the icon for dark mode in Icon Composer (e.g., fill variants, per-appearance settings)
Mentions the Mono appearance and what to consider for tinted mode (e.g., setting primary element to white, contrast hierarchy)
